heading: Maryland DHS FIA Information Memo 25-12, 2025 TCA TDAP RCA benefit increase

metadata.source_authority: Maryland Department of Human Services, Family Investment Administration
metadata.source_note: Official DHS FIA memo setting the January 1, 2025 TCA schedule used operationally under the statutory MLL funding rule and COMAR TCA benefit framework.
metadata.title: Maryland DHS FIA Information Memo 25-12, 2025 TCA TDAP RCA benefit increase

body: The Maryland Department of Human Services (DHS) increased the Temporary Cash Assistance (TCA), Temporary Disability Assistance Program (TDAP), and Refugee Cash Assistance (RCA) benefit amount effective January 1, 2025. The maximum monthly TCA benefit for a household size of three increased from $727 to $753, representing a $26 (3.6%) increase. TDAP benefits increased to $339, which is equivalent to the maximum TCA benefit amount for a household of one. RCA benefits increased following the TCA payment schedule. This adjustment is based on the updated Minimum Living Level (MLL) calculation, which reflects a 3.3% increase due to changes in the Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) between May 2023 and May 2024. The current benefit amount of $727 has remained unchanged since FY 2020. 3 Effective January 1, 2025, the monthly benefit amount for TCA and RCA will follow the Family Investment Program (FIP) Schedule below, while TDAP benefits will be equivalent to TCA maximum allowance for a household of one. Note: This action transmittal replaces AT #22-26, AT#22-27, and AT#22-31.
